info.name: Firefly Aerospace
info.description: Firefly Aerospace does not publish a public developer API. This Postman collection is an intentionally minimal placeholder maintained for catalog consistency. Firefly's offerings - Alpha and Eclipse launch, Blue Ghost lunar delivery, and Elytra/Ocula on-orbit services - are arranged through sales, the "Book A Ride" web inquiry workflow, and published Payload User's Guides, not through a programmatic API. The link below points to Firefly's public website rather than an API endpoint.

request.description: Public marketing and product website. Firefly Aerospace exposes no public developer API; this request simply fetches the website homepage.
